_comment: Copy this file and fill in your own values. Fields marked REQUIRED must be set.

input.description: Brief description of your dataset and analysis goals

magic-data-loading._comment: List columns your data MUST have. Loading fails if these are missing.

magic-data-profiling._comment: Minimum acceptable quality score (0-100). Set to 0 to skip this check.

magic-data-cleaning._comment: Expected issue types: missing_values, duplicates, outliers, type_errors. Strategy: auto, median, mean, mode, drop_rows.

magic-statistical-analysis._comment: Columns to analyze. Tests: descriptive, correlation, hypothesis.

magic-report-generation._comment: Templates: standard, executive, technical. Focus: describe what the report should emphasize.

quality_gates._comment: min_rows_after_cleaning: fail if fewer rows remain. max_missing_pct: fail if missing data exceeds this %.

agent_prompt.template: Load the file at {file_path}. {pipeline_description} Focus on: {focus}
agent_prompt._comment: Template for generating the agent prompt. {file_path} and {focus} are auto-filled from config.
